title: After the Satsuki Sho: Next Time for Sure!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...I lost!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Maaan, I still couldn't show what I'm really made
of!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I thought I gave it everything I had, so what the
heck?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess that's the Classic Triple Crown tour
for you... Everyone sure was fierce...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I'm still just getting started! I may have lost
my chance at the Triple Crown, but the tour's not
over yet.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And now that I've seen Bourbon run up close, I've
got a decent feel for how she runs.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So... it'll be fine! I still have a chance to win the
Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, not so far away...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey, is Bourbon... okay?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Failure to secure victory in the Satsuki Sho has
rendered the Triple Crown unattainable. The one
and only dream that I shared with Father is...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Oxygen levels declining below normal levels.
Cause unknown. Executing emergency deep
breathing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Phew. The next race is the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Even if I'm defeated, I cannot stop running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon quickly leaves the racecourse.
Behind her, a small figure runs up, as if to chase
after her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...No, this isn't the time to worry.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that Bourbon and everyone else will be
much stronger next race!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I have so, so, sooo much work to do before the
Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I need to get stronger... Much, much stronger!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Rice... And Bourbon... They sure looked
determined, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Now that I think about it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Rice was awesome today too in her own way!
Like, bam! Wowza!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I think she's going to go even harder in the
Japanese Derby and the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I really can't afford to let up. So it's time to put in
the work!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: First things first! Let's go eat some ramen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Because I'm starving!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, we go inside the first ramen shop we
come across and get our slurp on.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! More noodles, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We recharge and shift our focus to the upcoming
Japanese Derby!
